name: Baked Vidalia Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions and cut them in half, crosswise.
2. Arrange the onion halves with cut sides up in a greased 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
3. Add enough wine to cover the bottom of the casserole dish.
4. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the onions.
5. Cover the dish and bake at 375 degrees F for 30 minutes.
6. Remove the lid and top the onions with bread crumbs mixed with Parmesan cheese.
7. Continue baking uncovered for 15 to 20 minutes longer, or until the onions are brown and tender.
8. Makes 6 servings.
